description: The wife of Ṣedaqa b. ʿEzra gives to her husband reshut over a house (which was part of her ketubba from her father's inheritance) after her death, and something involving her store. The boundaries of the property are described. Also it is specified that the property includes its toilets (ובתי תשמישיה) Dating: Likely ca. 11th century. (Information mainly from Goitein's index card.)
description_he: אשת צדקה ב' עזרא נותנת לבעלה רשות על בית (שהיה חלק מכתובתה מירושת אביה) לאחר מותה. מפרטת גבולות הנכס הכולל בתי שימוש. כנראה מהמאה ה-11.
